title: Let Sleeping Dogs Lie - Fabric
description: Mod that lets dogs lie down after sitting for a while.
body:
![Dogs lying down](https://i.imgur.com/72LNflb.png) A bunch of dogs lying down in the various poses available in this mod

## This is a Fabric port of a Forge mod.

## This mod requires Cloth Config and Fabric API, and Mod Menu to change configurations.
Original description:
## About
Despite the name, this mod, in a literal sense, lets dogs that have been left sitting down too long, actually lie down and get some rest.

After having sat for a configurable amount of time, without their owners close by, they will lie down to rest in a random position, and will excitedly jump back to sitting position once their owner gets close to them once more!

This mod is purely client-side and only requires ~~Minecraft Forge~~ Fabric, Fabric API, and Cloth Config. ~~This mod is also not compatible with Doggy Talents as they're a full wolf/dog overhaul mod and this, well, isn't.~~

 

## Configs
Dogs Spawn Lying Down - Do dogs spawn into the world lying down if they're already sitting when you enter the world?

Enabled Poses - By default all poses are enabled and randomization of approximately 50 different combinations of dogs lying down.

Dogs Get Up For - Dogs can get up from lying position back to sitting position depending on who passes near them.

Range for Dogs to Get Up - The range for the above configuration.

Time Before Lie - The time that has to pass before dogs lie down.

Attempt Mod Wolf Support - Attempts to add the model support for other modded wolves.
